name: scale model wizard
description: Generate an interactive 3D scale model simulation from a text description. Uses a two-pass AI pipeline: a planner builds a manifest of models and timeline markers, then a builder constructs each model with stats, lifecycle phases, movement behaviors (wander, patrol, follow), spawning/mating logic, and per-tick listeners. Best for visualizing business scenarios, ecosystems, or any simulation where entities change state and move over time.
